ceremony_locations.name: Garden Chapel
ceremony_locations.short_description: Romantic outdoor garden chapel with vine-covered arch and bistro lighting.
ceremony_locations.long_description: Our Garden Chapel is an outdoor ceremony space nestled among mature trees, string lights, and seasonal blooms. A whitewashed arbor frames your vows, with built-in audio for your officiant and music. Ideal for sunset ceremonies and larger guest counts, the Garden Chapel includes white ceremony chairs, a dedicated aisle, and nearby access to indoor restrooms and a covered rain backup aisle.

ceremony_locations.name: Rose Garden Courtyard
ceremony_locations.short_description: Brick courtyard surrounded by rose beds and ivy walls.
ceremony_locations.long_description: The Rose Garden Courtyard offers an intimate open-air ceremony setting enclosed by ivy-covered brick walls and manicured rose beds. A central fountain creates a soft ambient soundtrack as guests are seated under market lights. This location is perfect for medium to large garden ceremonies with a romantic European feel.

ceremony_locations.name: Classic Indoor Chapel
ceremony_locations.short_description: Traditional white chapel with pew seating, stained glass, and climate control.
ceremony_locations.long_description: Our Classic Indoor Chapel features wooden pews, soft uplighting, and stained glass accents for a timeless ceremony backdrop. The space is fully climate controlled and includes an integrated sound system, discrete photo vantage points, and a center aisle perfect for elopements, intimate ceremonies, and traditional weddings alike.

ceremony_locations.name: Grand Cathedral Chapel
ceremony_locations.short_description: Large vaulted chapel with balcony seating and grand center aisle.
ceremony_locations.long_description: The Grand Cathedral Chapel is our largest indoor space, accommodating up to 200 guests beneath soaring ceilings and exposed beams. Floor-to-ceiling windows bring in natural light, while candlelit sconces and a raised altar create an unforgettable setting for formal ceremonies and large celebrations.

ceremony_locations.name: Riverfront Gazebo
ceremony_locations.short_description: Intimate gazebo overlooking the river, perfect for small ceremonies and elopements.
ceremony_locations.long_description: Exchange vows under a white gazebo with sweeping river views. The Riverfront Gazebo is ideal for elopements and micro-weddings, offering a tranquil setting a short walk from the main chapel. Simple seating, lantern accents, and flexible weekday availability make this a popular choice for smaller celebrations.

ceremony_locations.name: Terrace Overlook
ceremony_locations.short_description: Covered terrace with garden overlook and flexible indoor backup.
ceremony_locations.long_description: The Terrace Overlook combines the best of indoor comfort and outdoor ambiance. Couples say 'I do' on a covered terrace framed by potted trees and skyline views, with a connected indoor lounge for weather backup. Ideal for mid-size weddings seeking a modern twist on a garden ceremony.

ceremony_locations.name: Library Reading Room
ceremony_locations.short_description: Cozy book-lined room ideal for literary-inspired elopements.
ceremony_locations.long_description: For couples who love books, the Library Reading Room offers floor-to-ceiling shelves, leather chairs, and warm lamplight for intimate ceremonies. This unconventional indoor space works best for elopements and very small gatherings with a vintage, personal feel.

ceremony_locations.name: Courtyard Arcade
ceremony_locations.short_description: Open-air courtyard with arched columns and string lights.
ceremony_locations.long_description: The Courtyard Arcade features a series of stone arches surrounding a central ceremony space. Twinkling lights overhead create a magical atmosphere for twilight ceremonies, while the open layout works beautifully for creative aisle setups and cultural traditions.

faq_items.question: What is the deposit and payment schedule?
faq_items.answer: To reserve your date, we require a non-refundable deposit of 25% of your selected package total. A second payment of 25% is due 6 months before your ceremony date, and the remaining 50% balance is due 30 days prior to the event. We accept major credit cards, checks, and ACH transfers. If you book less than 6 months in advance, the deposit and second payment are combined into a 50% initial payment, with the remaining 50% still due 30 days before your date.

faq_items.question: Can we reschedule our wedding date?
faq_items.answer: Yes, you may request a one-time reschedule up to 90 days before your original ceremony date, subject to availability. Your deposit will transfer to the new date, but package pricing and seasonal promotions may change. Reschedule requests made within 90 days of the ceremony are handled on a case-by-case basis and may incur a change fee.

faq_items.question: How long is a typical ceremony?
faq_items.answer: Most ceremonies at our chapel last between 20 and 30 minutes, depending on readings, traditions, and whether you include additional rituals such as unity candles or special musical performances. We schedule 60–90 minute time blocks for each ceremony to allow for guest seating, processional, and photos afterward.

faq_items.question: Is there an indoor backup option for outdoor ceremonies?
faq_items.answer: Yes. For all outdoor garden ceremonies, we reserve an indoor backup space in case of inclement weather. The specific backup location depends on your package and guest count. A final weather call is typically made 4 hours before ceremony time in coordination with your coordinator.

faq_items.question: Can we bring our own photographer?
faq_items.answer: You are welcome to bring your own professional photographer. If your selected package already includes photography, you can either use our in-house team or ask your coordinator about substituting photographer hours for another service. All outside photographers must sign our vendor agreement and provide proof of liability insurance.

faq_items.question: What is the maximum guest capacity?
faq_items.answer: Our largest spaces can accommodate up to 200 guests for a ceremony. The Classic Indoor Chapel comfortably seats up to 80 guests, while the Garden Chapel and Grand Cathedral Chapel can host between 150 and 200 guests depending on layout. Elopement packages are designed for 2–25 guests.

faq_items.question: What ceremony music options do you offer?
faq_items.answer: We offer several ceremony music options, including recorded playlists, live piano, and live string ensembles. Our package builder lets you preview pricing for each option, and your coordinator can help you finalize selections and processional songs about 60 days before your date.

faq_items.question: Do you offer receptions or catering?
faq_items.answer: Our focus is on ceremonies and short photo sessions. We partner with several nearby venues and restaurants that specialize in receptions and catering. Your coordinator can provide a referral list and approximate travel times so you can plan a seamless transition from ceremony to reception.

faq_items.question: Is parking available for guests?
faq_items.answer: Yes, we have an on-site parking lot that can accommodate approximately 90 vehicles. Overflow parking is available on nearby streets and in a public lot two blocks away. Accessible parking spaces are located closest to the chapel entrance.

faq_items.question: How do we schedule a venue tour?
faq_items.answer: You can schedule an in-person or virtual tour using the “Book a Tour” link in our main navigation. Choose your preferred date, time, and ceremony location, then submit the request form. Our team will confirm availability and send you a confirmation email within one business day.

packages.name: September Sunset Chapel Special
packages.short_description: Discounted Saturday evening ceremonies in September for up to 80 guests.
packages.long_description: Our September Sunset Chapel Special is designed for couples seeking a beautiful evening ceremony at a value-friendly rate. Host your ceremony in the Classic Indoor Chapel or Garden Chapel with seating for up to 80 guests. This package includes a 30-minute ceremony window, basic ceremony coordination, recorded processional music, and a short portrait session on the grounds.
packages.inclusions_summary: 30-minute ceremony, basic coordination, recorded music, 2 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 30-minute reserved ceremony time in the Classic Indoor Chapel or Garden Chapel.
• Seating for up to 80 guests.
• Basic ceremony coordination and processional cueing.
• Recorded processional and recessional music.
• 2 hours of professional photography coverage (ceremony and portraits).
• Use of the chapel grounds for photos for up to 30 minutes after the ceremony.

packages.name: Garden Twilight Celebration
packages.short_description: Evening garden ceremony with extended photography for 60–120 guests.
packages.long_description: The Garden Twilight Celebration centers your ceremony in the Garden Chapel at golden hour, surrounded by twinkle lights and lush greenery. Ideal for 60–120 guests, this package includes a 60-minute ceremony block, ceremony coordinator, live or recorded music options, and 4 hours of professional photography that can begin with pre-ceremony portraits and continue through family formals.
packages.inclusions_summary: Garden Chapel evening ceremony, coordination, and 4 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 60-minute ceremony reservation in the Garden Chapel.
• Seating and setup for up to 120 guests.
• Dedicated ceremony coordinator for rehearsal-day walk-through (if booked) and ceremony management.
• Choice of recorded music or live piano add-on.
• 4 consecutive hours of professional photography, beginning up to 60 minutes before the ceremony.
• Use of selected garden and courtyard areas for portraits.

packages.name: Classic Chapel Evening
packages.short_description: Traditional indoor chapel ceremony on Saturday evenings for up to 90 guests.
packages.long_description: The Classic Chapel Evening package offers a timeless ceremony in our Classic Indoor Chapel. Perfect for couples who prefer an indoor setting, this Saturday evening package includes a 45-minute ceremony block, ceremony director, recorded or piano music options, decor basics, and 3 hours of professional photography.
packages.inclusions_summary: Indoor chapel ceremony with decor basics and 3 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 45-minute reserved ceremony time in the Classic Indoor Chapel.
• Pew bows on front 8 rows and simple altar floral arrangements.
• Processional coordination and ceremony director.
• Recorded music with curated playlists, with option to add live piano.
• 3 hours of professional photography covering ceremony and portraits.
• Use of indoor foyer and chapel steps for photos.

packages.name: Grand Garden Soirée
packages.short_description: Large-scale garden ceremony for up to 160 guests with premium photography.
packages.long_description: Designed for larger guest lists, the Grand Garden Soirée combines our Garden Chapel with expanded seating, enhanced florals, and 5 hours of photography. This package is ideal for couples who want a full-scale celebration with plenty of time for portraits and extended family photos before and after the ceremony.
packages.inclusions_summary: Large garden ceremony for up to 160 guests with 5 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 90-minute ceremony reservation in the Garden Chapel.
• Seating for up to 160 guests with upgraded chairs.
• Enhanced floral decor at the arbor and along the aisle.
• Ceremony director and assistant for complex processionals.
• 5 hours of professional photography coverage.
• Use of multiple garden and courtyard locations for portraits.

packages.name: Intimate Weekday Chapel
packages.short_description: Budget-friendly weekday chapel ceremonies for up to 40 guests.
packages.long_description: The Intimate Weekday Chapel package is ideal for couples planning a smaller ceremony without sacrificing a beautiful setting. Available Monday through Thursday, this package includes a 30-minute ceremony in the Classic Indoor Chapel, basic decor, recorded music, and a brief photo session.
packages.inclusions_summary: Weekday indoor chapel ceremony with basic decor and a short photo session.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 30-minute reserved ceremony time in the Classic Indoor Chapel.
• Simple altar decor and basic pew bows.
• Recorded processional and recessional music.
• 1 hour of photography covering ceremony and quick portraits.
• Use of the chapel foyer for a brief receiving line.

packages.name: Sunday Garden Breeze
packages.short_description: Sunday afternoon garden ceremony for up to 140 guests.
packages.long_description: The Sunday Garden Breeze package offers a relaxed garden ceremony in the Rose Garden Courtyard or Garden Chapel on select Sundays. It includes a 60-minute ceremony block, ceremony director, curated recorded music, standard florals, and 3 hours of photography.
packages.inclusions_summary: Sunday garden ceremony with standard florals and 3 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 60-minute ceremony reservation in the Rose Garden Courtyard or Garden Chapel.
• Seating for up to 140 guests.
• Standard floral decor on the fountain or arbor.
• Ceremony director and assistant.
• 3 hours of professional photography.

packages.name: Simple Chapel Elopement
packages.short_description: Indoor chapel elopement for up to 10 guests, available on weekday afternoons and Mondays in November.
packages.long_description: The Simple Chapel Elopement is perfect for couples who want a quiet, meaningful ceremony with a small group of guests. Held in our Classic Indoor Chapel, this package includes a 20-minute ceremony window, simple decor, recorded music, and a brief photo session. It is specifically designed for 2–10 guests and is offered on select weekdays, including Mondays in November.
packages.inclusions_summary: Indoor chapel elopement with simple decor and a short photo session.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 20-minute ceremony reservation in the Classic Indoor Chapel.
• Seating for up to 10 guests.
• Simple altar arrangement and candle display.
• Recorded ceremony music.
• 1 hour of professional photography coverage.
• Use of one indoor or outdoor portrait location.

packages.name: Garden Sunrise Elopement
packages.short_description: Morning elopement in the Riverfront Gazebo or Garden Chapel for up to 15 guests.
packages.long_description: Start your wedding day with a peaceful sunrise ceremony in the Riverfront Gazebo or Garden Chapel. This weekday elopement package includes a 20-minute ceremony at first light, simple florals, and 1.5 hours of photography for portraits in the soft morning glow.
packages.inclusions_summary: Sunrise garden elopement with simple florals and 1.5 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 20-minute sunrise ceremony in the Riverfront Gazebo or Garden Chapel.
• Simple bouquet and boutonniere.
• Recorded ceremony music.
• 1.5 hours of photography for ceremony and portraits.
• Use of select garden paths for photos.

packages.name: Monday Night Minimony
packages.short_description: Cozy Monday night ceremony for up to 25 guests with extended photo time.
packages.long_description: The Monday Night Minimony is a hybrid between an elopement and a small wedding. Host your ceremony in the Classic Indoor Chapel or on the Terrace Overlook on select Monday evenings in November. This package includes a 30-minute ceremony, simple decor, and 2 hours of photography.
packages.inclusions_summary: Monday evening minimony with simple decor and 2 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 30-minute ceremony in the Classic Indoor Chapel or on the Terrace Overlook.
• Simple aisle decor and candles.
• Recorded or piano background music (piano add-on available).
• 2 hours of professional photography coverage.

packages.name: Weekday Riverfront Microwedding
packages.short_description: Intimate riverfront microwedding for 10–40 guests with flexible timing.
packages.long_description: Enjoy a relaxed riverfront ceremony at the gazebo followed by extended portraits along the water. The Weekday Riverfront Microwedding package includes a 45-minute ceremony block, simple decor, and 3 hours of photography, making it ideal for small but meaningful celebrations.
packages.inclusions_summary: Weekday riverfront microwedding with 3 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 45-minute ceremony at the Riverfront Gazebo.
• Simple decor at the gazebo entrance.
• Recorded ceremony music.
• 3 hours of photography including ceremony and riverside portraits.

packages.name: Grand Cathedral Classic
packages.short_description: Formal ceremony in the Grand Cathedral Chapel for up to 200 guests.
packages.long_description: The Grand Cathedral Classic package offers a formal indoor ceremony with grand architecture, balcony seating, and extended photography. This package is ideal for traditional weddings with large guest counts who want a grand processional and classical music.
packages.inclusions_summary: Grand indoor ceremony for up to 200 guests with 4 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 90-minute ceremony reservation in the Grand Cathedral Chapel.
• Seating for up to 200 guests.
• Classic altar floral arrangements and candle decor.
• Ceremony director and assistant.
• Option to add live organ or string quartet.
• 4 hours of professional photography coverage.

packages.name: Terrace Overlook Signature
packages.short_description: Modern mixed indoor-outdoor ceremony on the Terrace Overlook.
packages.long_description: The Terrace Overlook Signature package blends indoor comfort with outdoor views. Host your ceremony on the covered terrace with an indoor lounge as backup. Perfect for mid-size guest counts, this package includes a ceremony director, modern decor accents, and 3.5 hours of photography.
packages.inclusions_summary: Terrace ceremony with indoor backup and 3.5 hours of photography.
packages.detailed_inclusions:
• 60-minute ceremony block on the Terrace Overlook.
• Indoor lounge reserved as weather backup.
• Modern ceremony arch and chair decor.
• Ceremony director and audio technician.
• 3.5 hours of professional photography coverage.

location_add_on_options.name: 1-hour rehearsal the day before
location_add_on_options.description: Reserve the Garden Chapel for a 60-minute ceremony rehearsal on the day before your wedding, including basic coordination for processional order.

location_add_on_options.name: 1-hour rehearsal the day before
location_add_on_options.description: Walk through your ceremony in the Rose Garden Courtyard with a 60-minute rehearsal reservation the day before your event.

location_add_on_options.name: 45-minute ceremony rehearsal
location_add_on_options.description: Practice your processional and recessional in the Classic Indoor Chapel with a 45-minute guided rehearsal.

location_add_on_options.name: Expanded garden string lighting

location_add_on_options.name: Custom aisle petal design
location_add_on_options.description: Curated fresh flower petals arranged in patterns along your ceremony aisle in the Courtyard Arcade.

reviews.title: Perfect for our 120-guest cathedral ceremony
reviews.content: We hosted our wedding in the Grand Cathedral Chapel and it was absolutely stunning. The staff handled our large 120-person guest list with ease and coordinated a long processional flawlessly. The recommended timeline worked perfectly and our photos from the balcony are some of our favorite images. Highly recommend this package if you want a classic, grand feel.

reviews.title: Magical garden soiree with room for everyone
reviews.content: We chose the Grand Garden Soire because we had a big guest list and wanted a true garden vibe. We ended up with about 145 guests and still felt like everyone had a clear view of the ceremony. The expanded florals made the arbor look incredible and the extra photography time meant we didnt feel rushed at all.

reviews.title: Golden-hour garden dreams
reviews.content: The Garden Twilight Celebration hit the sweet spot for our 80-guest wedding. The evening light was gorgeous and the four hours of photography covered everything we needed. Our coordinator kept us on track without making anything feel rushed.

reviews.title: Cozy indoor chapel with beautiful photos
reviews.content: We picked the Classic Chapel Evening package because we wanted an indoor option for our September wedding. The chapel felt warm and intimate, and the included photography hours were enough for ceremony, family, and a few creative portraits outside.

reviews.title: Relaxed Sunday garden ceremony
reviews.content: The Sunday Garden Breeze package fit our budget and gave us the relaxed vibe we wanted. Our 110 guests were comfortably seated and the standard florals were prettier than we expected. Three hours of photography turned out to be just right.

reviews.title: Great value for a Saturday evening
reviews.content: We were planning on a budget and the September Sunset Chapel Special was such a good find. We had 60 guests on a Saturday evening and still stayed under our budget. The two hours of photography were enough to capture the essentials, and the indoor backup option put us at ease.

reviews.title: Sweet and simple weekday ceremony
reviews.content: The Intimate Weekday Chapel package was exactly what we wanted for a small Tuesday ceremony. The team handled our 25 guests easily and the simple decor looked elegant in photos.

reviews.title: Perfect Monday elopement
reviews.content: We booked the Simple Chapel Elopement for a Monday in November with just eight guests. The indoor chapel felt cozy, the staff handled everything, and the one hour of photography gave us beautiful portraits with our parents and a few couples shots outside.

reviews.title: Cozy Monday night minimony
reviews.content: Our Monday Night Minimony on the Terrace Overlook felt really special. We had 20 close friends and family, and the two hours of photography meant we could relax and enjoy ourselves without worrying about the timeline.

reviews.title: Sunrise ceremony worth the early wake-up
reviews.content: The Garden Sunrise Elopement gave us the quiet, reflective ceremony we hoped for. The morning light at the Riverfront Gazebo was gorgeous and the 1.5 hours of photography captured both the ceremony and some truly dreamy portraits.

reviews.title: Riverfront microwedding with stunning photos
reviews.content: We had about 30 guests for our weekday riverfront microwedding and everyone loved the setting. The three hours of photography let us get portraits along the water and group shots without feeling rushed.

reviews.title: Modern terrace ceremony with great backup plan
reviews.content: We chose the Terrace Overlook Signature package for its indoor backup option. Luckily the weather held and we were able to get married outside on the terrace, but knowing the lounge was reserved just for us was a huge stress reliever. Our 95 guests fit comfortably and the photos turned out beautifully.
